description: Suspect A-scan echo (cyan-ringed on a bezel thumbnail) threads a five-gate interrogation chain; rounded-hex gates light in narration order — MODE (L/T squiggles), VELOCITY (speedo v=?), TIME (timebase tick), AMPLITUDE (echo peak vs Z1|Z2 step), MOTION (angle probe + shifting echo) — track brightening gate by gate, verdict withheld for the next beat.
